_desc: Production-fidelity metro: dense center L1 (~180, SF8) + sparse west L2 (~45, SF9) + sparse east L3 (~45, SF7) suburbs. Geographic lat/lon + log-distance path-loss on BW125/10%-duty. 4 boundary gateways (2 L1<->L2 west, 2 L1<->L3 east), each with a dense center-side + sparse suburb-side herd. West<->east routes through the center.
